Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Application On Street Lounge, Llc
Off Calendar Jan-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
John W. Wiley, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Gary Pasquinelli
Fredrik Emilson, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: U Street Lounge and John Kelly

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Gary Pasquinelli's Application for right to attach order and writ of attachment as to U Street Lounge LLC is granted. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000 as to each writ. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
